TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure the array has at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: increment a random element by 5
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    follow_case.a[idx] += 5;
    
    return follow_case;
}
